trigger.description: An operator has set `[graph.numa_pin] enabled = false` (or the equivalent `EE_GRAPH_NUMA_PIN_DISABLE=1` env var) and a graph snapshot load runs. The loader short-circuits the pinning path, returns the operator-disabled fallback, and surfaces this code so `ee status --json` does not silently look identical to the unsupported-platform case.

expected_emission.repair_string: Set [graph.numa_pin] enabled = true (or unset EE_GRAPH_NUMA_PIN_DISABLE) and re-run to opt back into NUMA-aware snapshot pinning on supported Linux hosts.
